SELECT DISTINCTROW [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No]
FROM CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID
WHERE (((ORDER.[Accept Date])>#12/31/1999#))
GROUP BY [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No]
HAVING ((([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="Hide") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes));

SELECT CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, ORDER.OID, Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice, ORDER.[Accept Date]
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN [ORDER] ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], ORDER.[Accept Date]
HAVING ((([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="PPHM" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="IPM DATA"))
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Fname;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], EVENT.Completed, [ORDER DETAIL].[Accepted Date], EVENT.Billed, EVENT.Bill_Date, EVENT.[Paid Amount], EVENT.[Paid Amount 2], EVENT.[Paid Amount 3], EVENT.[Paid Amount 4], EVENT.[Paid  date 2], EVENT.[Paid date 3], EVENT.[Paid date 4], EVENT.[Paid Date 1], EVENT.[Check Number 1], EVENT.[Check Number 2], EVENT.[Check Number 3], EVENT.[Check Number 4], EVENT.[Paid in full], EVENT.[Billed 2], EVENT.[Billed 3], EVENT.[Billed 4], EVENT.[Bill_Date 3], EVENT.[Bill_Date 2], EVENT.[Bill_Date 4]
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE (((EVENT.Completed)=Yes) AND ((EVENT.Billed)=Yes) AND ((EVENT.[Paid in full])=No))
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.Lname;

SELECT ACCOUNTS_R.OID
FROM ACCOUNTS_R;

SELECT CUSTOMER.Source, ORDER.[Proposal Date], CUSTOMER.CID, ORDER.[Work Name], ORDER.OID, ORDER.[Accept Date], Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN [ORDER] ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Source, ORDER.[Proposal Date], CUSTOMER.CID, ORDER.[Work Name], ORDER.OID, ORDER.[Accept Date], [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]
HAVING (((CUSTOMER.Source) Like "*Angi*") AND ((ORDER.[Proposal Date])>#1/1/2021#) AND ((ORDER.[Accept Date]) Is Not Null))
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.CID;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.*, ORDER.*, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Description, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, Round([Order Detail.11 Price]*1.04,0) AS Expr1, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, [ORDER DETAIL].Start, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], ORDER.[Job Note], ORDER.[Annual Contract], CUSTOMER.[Customer Note], ORDER.[Proposal Date], ORDER.[Accept Date], EVENT.Gallonage, ORDER.[2019 Accepted], ORDER.[2018 Accepted], ORDER.[2017 Accepted], ORDER.[2016 Accepted], ORDER.[2015 Accepted], ORDER.[2014 Accepted], ORDER.[2013 Accepted], ORDER.[2012 Accepted], ORDER.[2011 Accepted], ORDER.[2010 Accepted], ORDER.[2009 Accepted], ORDER.[2008 Accepted], ORDER.[2007 Accepted], ORDER.[2006 Accepted], ORDER.[2005 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[19 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[19 Price], [ORDER DETAIL].[18 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[18 Price], [ORDER DETAIL].[17 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[17 Price], [ORDER DETAIL].[16 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[16 Price], [ORDER DETAIL].[15 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[15 Price], [ORDER DETAIL].[14 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[14 Price], [ORDER DETAIL].[13 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[13 Price], [ORDER DETAIL].[12 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[12 Price], [ORDER DETAIL].[11 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[11 Price], [ORDER DETAIL].[10 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[10 Price], [ORDER DETAIL].[09 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[09 Price], [ORDER DETAIL].[08 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[08 Price], [ORDER DETAIL].[07 Accepted], [ORDER DETAIL].[07 Price]
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE ((([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="worksheet") AND ((ORDER.[Annual Contract])=Yes) AND ((ORDER.[Proposal Date])<#1/1/2020#))
ORDER BY ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No];

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.[Work Street], ORDER.[Work City], CUSTOMER.Map, CUSTOMER.Grid, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [Rate] AS Expr1, [Amount] AS Expr2, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]
FROM ((CUSTOMER INNER JOIN [ORDER] ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE (([ORDER DETAIL].Pest Like "*Winter*") AND ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]="SPRAY") AND ([ORDER DETAIL].Accept=Yes) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].Start<#11/1/95#) AND (EVENT.Completed=No Or EVENT.Completed Is Null)) OR (([ORDER DETAIL].Pest Like "*Winter*") AND ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]="PPHM") AND ([ORDER DETAIL].Accept=Yes) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].Start<#11/1/95#) AND (EVENT.Completed=No Or EVENT.Completed Is Null))
ORDER BY ORDER.[Proposal Date] DESC;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.Map, CUSTOMER.Grid, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, EVENT.Completed, EVENT.Complete_Date, [ORDER DETAIL].Application
FROM ((CUSTOMER INNER JOIN [ORDER] ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]="LAWN") AND ([ORDER DETAIL].Accept=Yes))
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.Map;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.Map, CUSTOMER.Grid, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, EVENT.Completed, EVENT.Complete_Date, [ORDER DETAIL].Application, [ORDER DETAIL].Frequency, EVENT.[Event Price], EVENT.Event_No, EVENT.Event_Date
FROM ((CUSTOMER INNER JOIN [ORDER] ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE (([ORDER DETAIL].Pest Like "********** VISITS************") AND ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]="pphm") AND ([ORDER DETAIL].Accept=Yes)) OR (([ORDER DETAIL].Pest Like "Ticks*******************" Or [ORDER DETAIL].Pest Like "Health*****") AND ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]="pphm"))
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.Lname;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.Map, CUSTOMER.Grid, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, EVENT.Completed, EVENT.Complete_Date, [ORDER DETAIL].Application, EVENT.Completed
FROM ((CUSTOMER INNER JOIN [ORDER] ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE (([ORDER DETAIL].Pest Like "Health********") AND ([ORDER DETAIL].Start>#02/28/95#) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].End<#07/1/95#) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]="SPRAY") AND ([ORDER DETAIL].Accept=Yes))
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.Lname;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.[Work Street], ORDER.[Work City], CUSTOMER.Map, CUSTOMER.Grid, [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, EVENT.Completed, EVENT.Complete_Date, [ORDER DETAIL].Application, EVENT.Completed, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept
FROM ((CUSTOMER INNER JOIN [ORDER] ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept=Yes) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].Start>#03/30/95#) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].End<#11/30/95#) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]="SPRAY")) OR (([ORDER DETAIL].Pest Like "Ticks***************") AND ([ORDER DETAIL].Accept=Yes) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].Start>#04/1/95#) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].End<#11/30/95#) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]="SPRAY"))
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.Lname;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.CID, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], CUSTOMER.Lname, [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], CUSTOMER.Company, [ORDER DETAIL].Start, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, ORDER.[Work Street], ORDER.[Work City], CUSTOMER.[E-Mail], EVENT.Complete_Date
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE ((([ORDER DETAIL].Plant) Like "*Beech*") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Pest) Like "Beech*") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]) Not Like "Worksheet") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes))
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.CID, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], [ORDER DETAIL].[Accepted Date] DESC;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.CID, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], CUSTOMER.Lname, [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Description, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, ORDER.[Work Street], ORDER.[Work City], CUSTOMER.[E-Mail]
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE ((([ORDER DETAIL].Plant) Like "*Beech*") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Description) Not Like "*Take down*") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="worksheet"))
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.CID, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], [ORDER DETAIL].[Accepted Date] DESC;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Description, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, EVENT.Billed, EVENT.Bill_Date, EVENT.[Billed 2], EVENT.[Bill_Date 2]
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE (((EVENT.Billed)=No) AND ((EVENT.Completed)=Yes) AND ((EVENT.[To Bill])=Yes) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="WORKSHEET" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="INFO") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes) AND ((EVENT.[Paid in full])=No Or (EVENT.[Paid in full]) Is Null))
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.OID;

SELECT DISTINCTROW [Sequence] AS Expr1, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.[Work Street], CUSTOMER.Map, ORDER.[Work City], CUSTOMER.Grid, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], CUSTOMER.[Customer Note], ORDER.[Job Note], CUSTOMER.Company, [ORDER DETAIL].Start, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE ((([ORDER DETAIL].Pest) Like "*inject*") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="SPRAY") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes) AND ((EVENT.Completed)=No Or (EVENT.Completed) Is Null))
ORDER BY [ORDER DETAIL].[Accepted Date] DESC;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Fname, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], [ORDER DETAIL].Start, [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, CUSTOMER.[E-Mail]
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE ((([ORDER DETAIL].Plant) Like "*Boxwood*") AND ((CUSTOMER.[E-Mail]) Like "*@*"))
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], [ORDER DETAIL].[Accepted Date] DESC;

SELECT CUSTOMER.Lname, EVENT.[Paid Amount], EVENT.[Paid Amount 2], EVENT.[Check Number 1], ORDER.OID, EVENT.[Paid  date 2]
FROM ((CUSTOMER INNER JOIN [ORDER] ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Lname, EVENT.[Paid Amount], EVENT.[Paid Amount 2], EVENT.[Check Number 1], EVENT.[Check Number 2], ORDER.OID, EVENT.[Paid  date 2]
HAVING (((EVENT.[Paid  date 2])>#9/29/99#));

SELECT CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Company, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], CUSTOMER.CID
FROM CUSTOMER
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Company, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], CUSTOMER.CID, CUSTOMER.[Wood Chips]
HAVING (((CUSTOMER.[Wood Chips])=Yes))
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.Lname;

SELECT CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Map, CUSTOMER.Grid, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.Zip, CUSTOMER.Phone, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], CUSTOMER.[Cell Phone], CUSTOMER.[Customer Note], CUSTOMER.CID
FROM CUSTOMER
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Map, CUSTOMER.Grid, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.Zip, CUSTOMER.Phone, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], CUSTOMER.[Cell Phone], CUSTOMER.[Customer Note], CUSTOMER.CID, CUSTOMER.[Wood Chips], CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Fax, CUSTOMER.Firewood
HAVING (((CUSTOMER.[Wood Chips])=Yes))
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.Map, CUSTOMER.Grid, CUSTOMER.Lname;

SELECT DISTINCTROW [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, EVENT.Completed, Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice, EVENT.[Paid in full], ORDER.[Ck # 1]
FROM EVENT INNER JOIN (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) ON (EVENT.[Line No] = [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No]) AND (EVENT.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID)
WHERE (((ORDER.[Accept Date])>#12/31/1999#))
GROUP BY [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, EVENT.Completed, EVENT.[Paid in full], ORDER.[Ck # 1]
HAVING ((([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]) Not Like "IPM DATA") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes) AND ((EVENT.Completed)=Yes) AND ((EVENT.[Paid in full])=Yes) AND ((ORDER.[Ck # 1]) Is Null));

SELECT DISTINCTROW [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, EVENT.Completed, Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice
FROM EVENT INNER JOIN (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) ON (EVENT.[Line No] = [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No]) AND (EVENT.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID)
WHERE (((ORDER.[Accept Date])>#12/31/1999#))
GROUP BY [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, EVENT.Completed
HAVING ((([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]) Not Like "IPM DATA") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes) AND ((EVENT.Completed)=Yes));

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Company, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, ORDER.OID, ORDER.[Work Name], ORDER.[Work Street], ORDER.[Work City], ORDER.[Work State], ORDER.[Work Zip], [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], [ORDER DETAIL].Price, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Description, CUSTOMER.CID, EVENT.Complete_Date, EVENT.Bill_Date, EVENT.[Paid Amount], CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], CUSTOMER.Fax, CUSTOMER.Phone, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], CUSTOMER.Phone, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], EVENT.[Paid Amount 2], EVENT.[Paid Amount 3], Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Company, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, ORDER.OID, ORDER.[Work Name], ORDER.[Work Street], ORDER.[Work City], ORDER.[Work State], ORDER.[Work Zip], [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], [ORDER DETAIL].Price, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Description, CUSTOMER.CID, EVENT.Complete_Date, EVENT.Bill_Date, EVENT.[Paid Amount], CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], CUSTOMER.Fax, CUSTOMER.Phone, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], CUSTOMER.Phone, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], EVENT.[Paid Amount 2], EVENT.[Paid Amount 3], [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, EVENT.Completed, EVENT.[To Bill], EVENT.[Paid in full], EVENT.Billed
HAVING ((([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="WORKSHEET") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes) AND ((EVENT.Completed)=Yes) AND ((EVENT.[To Bill])=Yes) AND ((EVENT.[Paid in full])=No) AND ((EVENT.Billed)=Yes));

SELECT CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.Zip, CUSTOMER.[Customer Note], CUSTOMER.CID
FROM CUSTOMER
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.Zip, CUSTOMER.[Customer Note], CUSTOMER.CID, CUSTOMER.State
HAVING (((CUSTOMER.Lname)="Resident"))
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.CID;

SELECT CUSTOMER.CID, CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Company, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.State, CUSTOMER.Zip, CUSTOMER.Source, CUSTOMER.Map, CUSTOMER.Grid, CUSTOMER.Phone, CUSTOMER.Fax, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], CUSTOMER.[Customer Note], CUSTOMER.[Cell Phone], CUSTOMER.[E-Mail], CUSTOMER.Referance, CUSTOMER.[Tax Exempt], CUSTOMER.[Wood Chips], CUSTOMER.Firewood
FROM CUSTOMER;

SELECT DISTINCTROW [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, No AS Expr1, EVENT.Completed, EVENT.[To Bill], EVENT.Billed, EVENT.[Billed 2], EVENT.[Billed 3], EVENT.[Billed 4], EVENT.[Paid in full], [Blank] AS Expr2, ORDER.[Accept Date], EVENT.Complete_Date, EVENT.Bill_Date, EVENT.[Bill_Date 2], EVENT.[Bill_Date 3], EVENT.[Bill_Date 4], ORDER.[Pd Date 1], ORDER.[Pd Date 2], ORDER.[Pd Date 3], ORDER.[Pd Date 4], ORDER.[Pd Date 5], ORDER.[Pd Date 6], ORDER.[Ck # 1], ORDER.[Ck # 2], ORDER.[Ck # 3], ORDER.[Ck # 4], ORDER.[Ck # 5], ORDER.[Ck # 6], ORDER.[Pd Amt 1], ORDER.[Pd Amt 2], ORDER.[Pd Amt 3], ORDER.[Pd Amt 4], ORDER.[Pd Amt 5], ORDER.[Pd Amt 6], [ORDER DETAIL].[Accepted Date], EVENT.Gallonage, [ORDER DETAIL].Start, ORDER.[PrePaid Disc Given], ORDER.[Write-Off Given]
FROM ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE (((ORDER.[Annual Contract])=Yes) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="WORKSHEET" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="info" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="chips")) OR (((ORDER.[Annual Contract])=Yes) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="Hide") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Description) Is Not Null) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Pest) Is Null))
ORDER BY ORDER.[Pd Amt 1] DESC , ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No];

SELECT DISTINCTROW [ORDER DETAIL].Accept, No AS Expr1, EVENT.Completed, EVENT.[To Bill], EVENT.Billed, EVENT.[Billed 2], EVENT.[Billed 3], EVENT.[Billed 4], EVENT.[Paid in full], [Blank] AS Expr2, ORDER.[Accept Date], ORDER.[Service Declined], [ORDER DETAIL].[Accepted Date], EVENT.Complete_Date, ORDER.[Pd Date 1], ORDER.[Pd Date 2], ORDER.[Pd Date 3], ORDER.[Pd Date 4], ORDER.[Pd Date 5], ORDER.[Pd Date 6], ORDER.[Ck # 1], ORDER.[Ck # 2], ORDER.[Ck # 3], ORDER.[Ck # 4], ORDER.[Ck # 5], ORDER.[Ck # 6], ORDER.[Pd Amt 1], ORDER.[Pd Amt 2], ORDER.[Pd Amt 3], ORDER.[Pd Amt 4], ORDER.[Pd Amt 5], ORDER.[Pd Amt 6], ORDER.[PrePaid Disc Given], ORDER.[Write-Off Given], EVENT.Bill_Date, EVENT.[Bill_Date 2], EVENT.[Bill_Date 3], EVENT.[Bill_Date 4], EVENT.Gallonage, [ORDER DETAIL].Start
FROM ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE (((No)=No) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="Spray" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="PPHM" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="info drf" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="info merit" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="info pphm" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="Info spray" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="ipm data")) OR (((No)=No) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="Hide") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Description) Is Null)) OR (((No)=No) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="Hide") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Description) Is Not Null) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Pest) Is Not Null))
ORDER BY ORDER.[Pd Amt 1] DESC;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.CID, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice, EVENT.Bill_Date, EVENT.[Paid Amount], EVENT.[Check Number 1], EVENT.[Paid in full], EVENT.Deposited, EVENT.[Deposited date]
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE (((EVENT.[To be Deposited])=Yes))
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.CID, ORDER.OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], EVENT.Bill_Date, EVENT.[Paid Amount], EVENT.[Check Number 1], EVENT.[Paid in full], EVENT.Deposited, EVENT.[Deposited date]
HAVING (((EVENT.Deposited)=Yes))
ORDER BY CUSTOMER.Lname;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Lname, ORDER.[Work Street], EVENT.Completed, EVENT.Complete_Date, EVENT.Gallonage, [ORDER DETAIL].OID, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [ORDER DETAIL].Price
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)
WHERE (((CUSTOMER.Lname)=[Forms]![CUSTOMER]![lname]) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Pest) Like "Health****") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Start)<Now()) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="SPRAY" Or ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="PPHM") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes)) OR (((CUSTOMER.Lname)=[Forms]![CUSTOMER]![lname]) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Start)<Now()) AND (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type])="INFO DRF") AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept)=Yes))
ORDER BY EVENT.Complete_Date, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No];

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Lname, [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No], ORDER.[Work Street], EVENT.Completed, EVENT.Complete_Date, EVENT.Gallonage, [ORDER DETAIL].Location, [ORDER DETAIL].Plant, [ORDER DETAIL].Pest, [ORDER DETAIL].Price, [ORDER DETAIL].Start
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)

FROM ((CUSTOMER INNER JOIN [ORDER] ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID)

GROUP BY CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], ORDER.OID, CUSTOMER.Phone, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], ORDER.[Proposal Date], ORDER.[Job Note], ORDER.[2008 Accepted], ORDER.[2007 Accepted], ORDER.[Accept Date]
HAVING (((ORDER.[Proposal Date])<#2/9/2018#) AND ((ORDER.[Accept Date])=No Or (ORDER.[Accept Date]) Is Null))
ORDER BY ORDER.OID DESC , ORDER.[Proposal Date] DESC;

SELECT DISTINCTROW CUSTOMER.Title, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type], ORDER.OID, Sum([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS SumOfPrice, CUSTOMER.Phone, CUSTOMER.[Evening Phone], ORDER.[Proposal Date], ORDER.[Job Note]

HAVING (((ORDER.[Proposal Date])>#10/1/2010#) AND ((ORDER.[Accept Date])=No Or (ORDER.[Accept Date]) Is Null))

INSERT INTO Payments ( OrderID, CID, PaymentDate, AmountPaid, PaidIndex )
SELECT OID, CID, [Pd Date 1], [Pd Amt 1], 1
FROM [Order]
WHERE [Pd Amt 1] <> 0
    AND NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT
            1
        FROM
            Payments
        WHERE
            Payments.OrderID = [Order].OID
            AND Payments.PaidIndex = 1
    );

UPDATE (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON ORDER.OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = ORDER.CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID) SET EVENT.Billed = IIf(Nz (EVENT.Billed, No) = No, Yes, EVENT.Billed), EVENT.Bill_Date = IIf(
        Nz (EVENT.Billed, No) = No,
        Date(),
        EVENT.Bill_Date
    ), EVENT.[Billed 2] = IIf(
        Nz (EVENT.Billed, No) = Yes
        AND Nz (EVENT.[Billed 2], No) = No,
        Yes,
        EVENT.[Billed 2]
    ), EVENT.[Bill_Date 2] = IIf(
        Nz (EVENT.Billed, No) = Yes
        AND Nz (EVENT.[Billed 2], No) = No,
        Date(),
        EVENT.[Bill_Date 2]
    ), EVENT.[Billed 3] = IIf(
        Nz (EVENT.Billed, No) = Yes
        AND Nz (EVENT.[Billed 2], No) = Yes
        AND Nz (EVENT.[Billed 3], No) = No,
        Yes,
        EVENT.[Billed 3]
    ), EVENT.[Bill_Date 3] = IIf(
        Nz (EVENT.Billed, No) = Yes
        AND Nz (EVENT.[Billed 2], No) = Yes
        AND Nz (EVENT.[Billed 3], No) = No,
        Date(),
        EVENT.[Bill_Date 3]
    ), EVENT.[Billed 4] = IIf(
        Nz (EVENT.Billed, No) = Yes
        AND Nz (EVENT.[Billed 2], No) = Yes
        AND Nz (EVENT.[Billed 3], No) = Yes
        AND Nz (EVENT.[Billed 4], No) = No,
        Yes,
        EVENT.[Billed 4]
    ), EVENT.[Bill_Date 4] = IIf(
        Nz (EVENT.Billed, No) = Yes
        AND Nz (EVENT.[Billed 2], No) = Yes
        AND Nz (EVENT.[Billed 3], No) = Yes
        AND Nz (EVENT.[Billed 4], No) = No,
        Date(),
        EVENT.[Bill_Date 4]
    )
WHERE (
        (
            ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]) = "PPHM"
            OR ([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]) = "SPRAY"
        )
        AND (
            (EVENT.[Paid in full]) = No
            OR (EVENT.[Paid in full]) IS NULL
        )
        AND ((EVENT.Completed) = Yes)
        AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept) = Yes)

    );

SELECT CUSTOMER.CID, CUSTOMER.Company AS Company, CUSTOMER.Fname AS Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, SUM([ORDER DETAIL].Price) AS CompletedWork, Nz (
			DSum (
				"Nz(ORDER.[PrePaid Disc Given],0)",
				"ORDER",
				"CID=" & CUSTOMER.CID
			), 0
		) AS PrepaidDiscount, Nz (
			DSum (
				"Nz(ORDER.[Write-Off Given],0)",
				"ORDER",
				"CID=" & CUSTOMER.CID
			), 0
		) AS WriteOff, SUM([ORDER DETAIL].Price)
		- Nz (
				DSum (
					"Nz(ORDER.[PrePaid Disc Given],0)",
					"ORDER",
					"CID=" & CUSTOMER.CID
				), 0
			) 
		- Nz (
				DSum (
					"Nz(ORDER.[Write-Off Given],0)",
					"ORDER",
					"CID=" & CUSTOMER.CID
				), 0
			) AS AdjustedSubtotal, CUSTOMER.[Tax Exempt], ROUND(
		IIf(
			CUSTOMER.[Tax Exempt] = True, 0
			, 0.0635 * 
				(SUM([ORDER DETAIL].Price)
					- Nz (
							DSum (
								"Nz(ORDER.[PrePaid Disc Given],0)",
								"ORDER",
								"CID=" & CUSTOMER.CID
							), 0
						) 
					- Nz (
							DSum (
								"Nz(ORDER.[Write-Off Given],0)",
								"ORDER",
								"CID=" & CUSTOMER.CID
							), 0
						)
				)
			)
		, 2) AS TaxAmount, SUM([ORDER DETAIL].Price)
		- Nz (
				DSum (
					"Nz(ORDER.[PrePaid Disc Given],0)",
					"ORDER",
					"CID=" & CUSTOMER.CID
				), 0
			) 
		- Nz (
				DSum (
					"Nz(ORDER.[Write-Off Given],0)",
					"ORDER",
					"CID=" & CUSTOMER.CID
				), 0
			)
		+ ROUND(
			IIf(
				CUSTOMER.[Tax Exempt] = True, 0
				, 0.0635 * 
					(SUM([ORDER DETAIL].Price)
						- Nz (
								DSum (
									"Nz(ORDER.[PrePaid Disc Given],0)",
									"ORDER",
									"CID=" & CUSTOMER.CID
								), 0
							) 
						- Nz (
								DSum (
									"Nz(ORDER.[Write-Off Given],0)",
									"ORDER",
									"CID=" & CUSTOMER.CID
								), 0
							)
					)
				)
			, 2) AS InvoiceAmount, Nz (
			DSum (
				"Nz([Pd Amt 1],0)+Nz([Pd Amt 2],0)+Nz([Pd Amt 3],0)+Nz([Pd Amt 4],0)+Nz([Pd Amt 5],0)+Nz([Pd Amt 6],0)",
				"ORDER",
				"CID=" & CUSTOMER.CID
			), 0
		) AS PaidAmount, SUM([ORDER DETAIL].Price)
		- Nz (
				DSum (
					"Nz(ORDER.[PrePaid Disc Given],0)",
					"ORDER",
					"CID=" & CUSTOMER.CID
				), 0
			) 
		- Nz (
				DSum (
					"Nz(ORDER.[Write-Off Given],0)",
					"ORDER",
					"CID=" & CUSTOMER.CID
				), 0
			)
		+ ROUND(
			IIf(
				CUSTOMER.[Tax Exempt] = True, 0
				, 0.0635 * 
					(SUM([ORDER DETAIL].Price)
						- Nz (
								DSum (
									"Nz(ORDER.[PrePaid Disc Given],0)",
									"ORDER",
									"CID=" & CUSTOMER.CID
								), 0
							) 
						- Nz (
								DSum (
									"Nz(ORDER.[Write-Off Given],0)",
									"ORDER",
									"CID=" & CUSTOMER.CID
								), 0
							)
					)
				)
			, 2)
		- Nz (
				DSum (
					"Nz([Pd Amt 1],0)+Nz([Pd Amt 2],0)+Nz([Pd Amt 3],0)+Nz([Pd Amt 4],0)+Nz([Pd Amt 5],0)+Nz([Pd Amt 6],0)",
					"ORDER",
					"CID=" & CUSTOMER.CID
				), 0
			) AS BalanceDue
FROM (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON [ORDER].OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = [ORDER].CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No])
WHERE EVENT.Completed = Yes
	AND (
		EVENT.[Paid in full] = No
		OR EVENT.[Paid in full] IS NULL
	)
	AND [ORDER DETAIL].Price IS NOT NULL
	AND [ORDER DETAIL].Price <> 0
GROUP BY CUSTOMER.CID, CUSTOMER.Company, CUSTOMER.Fname, CUSTOMER.Lname, CUSTOMER.Street1, CUSTOMER.City, CUSTOMER.[Tax Exempt]
HAVING (SUM([ORDER DETAIL].Price)
		- Nz (
				DSum (
					"Nz(ORDER.[PrePaid Disc Given],0)",
					"ORDER",
					"CID=" & CUSTOMER.CID
				), 0
			) 
		- Nz (
				DSum (
					"Nz(ORDER.[Write-Off Given],0)",
					"ORDER",
					"CID=" & CUSTOMER.CID
				), 0
			)
		+ ROUND(
			IIf(
				CUSTOMER.[Tax Exempt] = True, 0
				, 0.0635 * 
					(SUM([ORDER DETAIL].Price)
						- Nz (
								DSum (
									"Nz(ORDER.[PrePaid Disc Given],0)",
									"ORDER",
									"CID=" & CUSTOMER.CID
								), 0
							) 
						- Nz (
								DSum (
									"Nz(ORDER.[Write-Off Given],0)",
									"ORDER",
									"CID=" & CUSTOMER.CID
								), 0
							)
					)
				)
			, 2)
		- Nz (
				DSum (
					"Nz([Pd Amt 1],0)+Nz([Pd Amt 2],0)+Nz([Pd Amt 3],0)+Nz([Pd Amt 4],0)+Nz([Pd Amt 5],0)+Nz([Pd Amt 6],0)",
					"ORDER",
					"CID=" & CUSTOMER.CID
				), 0
			)
	) > 0
ORDER BY SUM([ORDER DETAIL].Price)
		- Nz (
				DSum (
					"Nz(ORDER.[PrePaid Disc Given],0)",
					"ORDER",
					"CID=" & CUSTOMER.CID
				), 0
			) 
		- Nz (
				DSum (
					"Nz(ORDER.[Write-Off Given],0)",
					"ORDER",
					"CID=" & CUSTOMER.CID
				), 0
			)
		+ ROUND(
			IIf(
				CUSTOMER.[Tax Exempt] = True, 0
				, 0.0635 * 
					(SUM([ORDER DETAIL].Price)
						- Nz (
								DSum (
									"Nz(ORDER.[PrePaid Disc Given],0)",
									"ORDER",
									"CID=" & CUSTOMER.CID
								), 0
							) 
						- Nz (
								DSum (
									"Nz(ORDER.[Write-Off Given],0)",
									"ORDER",
									"CID=" & CUSTOMER.CID
								), 0
							)
					)
				)
			, 2)
		- Nz (
				DSum (
					"Nz([Pd Amt 1],0)+Nz([Pd Amt 2],0)+Nz([Pd Amt 3],0)+Nz([Pd Amt 4],0)+Nz([Pd Amt 5],0)+Nz([Pd Amt 6],0)",
					"ORDER",
					"CID=" & CUSTOMER.CID
				), 0
			) DESC;

SELECT C.CID, C.Lname, C.Fname, C.Street1, O.[Work Street], O.[Work City], C.City, C.State, C.Zip, C.Map, C.Grid, C.Phone, OD.OID, OD.[Line No], OD.[Prod Type], OD.Location, OD.Plant, OD.Pest, OD.Start, OD.Price, OD.LargeTree, OD.Priority, OD.Accept, E.Completed, E.Event_Date, E.Complete_Date, CA.AssignID, CA.Crew, CA.RouteOrder, CA.ScheduleDate, CA.Notes, IIf(CA.Selected IS NULL, False, CA.Selected) AS Selected
FROM (((CUSTOMER AS C INNER JOIN [ORDER] AS O ON C.CID = O.CID) INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] AS OD ON O.OID = OD.OID) LEFT JOIN EVENT AS E ON (OD.OID = E.OID) AND (OD.[Line No] = E.[Line No])) LEFT JOIN tblCrewAssignments AS CA ON (OD.OID = CA.OID) AND (OD.[Line No] = CA.LineNo)
WHERE OD.Accept = Yes
    AND (
        E.Completed = No
        OR E.Completed IS NULL
    )
    AND OD.[Prod Type] IN ('SPRAY', 'PPHM')
    AND CA.Crew IS NULL
ORDER BY C.City, C.Lname, OD.Start;

UPDATE (CUSTOMER INNER JOIN ([ORDER] INNER JOIN [ORDER DETAIL] ON [ORDER].OID = [ORDER DETAIL].OID) ON CUSTOMER.CID = [ORDER].CID) LEFT JOIN EVENT ON ([ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID) AND ([ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No]) SET EVENT.Billed = Yes, EVENT.Bill_Date = Date()
WHERE (
        (([ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type]) = "WORKSHEET")
        AND (([ORDER DETAIL].Accept) = Yes)
        AND ((EVENT.Completed) = Yes)
        AND ((EVENT.[To Bill]) = Yes)

Option Compare Database
Option Explicit

' ============================================================
'  frmDevTools VBA
'  Developer-only form for relinking backend
'  Never push this form to Brian
' ============================================================

Private Sub RelinkTo(sPath As String, sSuccessMsg As String)
    Dim db As Object
    Dim tdf As Object
    Dim nLinked As Integer
    Dim nFailed As Integer
    nLinked = 0
    nFailed = 0

    If Dir(sPath) = "" Then
        MsgBox "Failed â€” cannot find backend at:" & vbCrLf & sPath, vbCritical, "Relink Failed"
        Exit Sub
    End If

    Set db = CurrentDb()
    For Each tdf In db.TableDefs
        If tdf.Connect <> "" Then
            On Error Resume Next
            tdf.Connect = ";DATABASE=" & sPath
            tdf.RefreshLink
            If Err.Number <> 0 Then
                nFailed = nFailed + 1
                Err.Clear
            Else
                nLinked = nLinked + 1
            End If
            On Error GoTo 0
        End If
    Next tdf
    Set db = Nothing

    If nFailed > 0 Then
        MsgBox "Partial relink â€” " & nLinked & " succeeded, " & nFailed & " failed." & vbCrLf & _
               "Try running again.", vbExclamation, "Partial Relink"
    Else
        MsgBox sSuccessMsg & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & nLinked & " tables relinked.", vbInformation, "Success"
    End If
End Sub

    If IsNull(Me.txtLocalPath) Or Trim(Me.txtLocalPath) = "" Then

' =============================================================================
' Module: modScheduling
' Object Version: 2026_v2.5.20
' Saved: 2026-05-20
' Change: Pre-Step A rewritten — LIKE match performed entirely in VBA.
'         SQL concatenation of '*' & TreatmentName & '*' not evaluated as
'         dynamic pattern in Access SQL at runtime. Solution: load all
'         TreatmentNames into memory, match each Pest string via VBA Like
'         operator, update TreatmentID inline.
' Prior Version: 2026_v2.5.20 (SQL LIKE concatenation — not evaluated in Access)
' =============================================================================

Option Compare Database
Option Explicit

' ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
' Resolve backend path dynamically from existing linked table connect string
' ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

Private Function GetBackendPath() As String
    Dim db As DAO.Database
    Dim tdf As DAO.TableDef
    Dim sConn As String
    Set db = CurrentDb()
    For Each tdf In db.TableDefs
        If tdf.Connect <> "" Then
            ' Connect string format: ;DATABASE=C:\path\to\data-2026.accdb
            sConn = tdf.Connect
            If InStr(sConn, "DATABASE=") > 0 Then
                GetBackendPath = Mid(sConn, InStr(sConn, "DATABASE=") + 9)
                Exit Function
            End If
        End If
    Next tdf
    GetBackendPath = ""
End Function

' ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
' cmdUpdateScheduling_Click — main entry point
' ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

Public Sub cmdUpdateScheduling_Click()

    On Error GoTo ErrHandler

    Dim db As DAO.Database
    Dim otherID As Long

    Set db = CurrentDb()

    ' Resolve otherID for Pre-Step B catch-all
    Dim rsOther As DAO.Recordset
    Set rsOther = db.OpenRecordset( _
        "SELECT TreatmentID FROM tblTreatmentIntervals WHERE TreatmentName = 'Other'", _
        dbOpenSnapshot)
    If rsOther.EOF Then
        MsgBox "ERROR: 'Other' catch-all row not found in tblTreatmentIntervals.", vbCritical
        GoTo CleanUp
    End If
    otherID = rsOther!TreatmentID
    rsOther.Close

    ' -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    ' PRE-STEP A
    ' LIKE match performed entirely in VBA.
    ' Load all TreatmentNames into memory first, then loop ORDER DETAIL records
    ' and match each Pest string using VBA Like operator. First match wins
    ' (ORDER BY TreatmentID ascending for deterministic tiebreak).
    ' -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    Dim rsTreat As DAO.Recordset
    Dim rsDet As DAO.Recordset
    Dim matchID As Long

    Set rsTreat = db.OpenRecordset( _
        "SELECT TreatmentID, TreatmentName FROM tblTreatmentIntervals " & _
        "WHERE TreatmentName <> 'Other' " & _
        "ORDER BY TreatmentID", _
        dbOpenSnapshot)

    Set rsDet = db.OpenRecordset( _
        "SELECT OID, [Line No], Pest, TreatmentID FROM [ORDER DETAIL] " & _
        "WHERE [Prod Type] IN ('SPRAY','PPHM')", _
        dbOpenDynaset)

    Do While Not rsDet.EOF
        matchID = 0
        rsTreat.MoveFirst
        Do While Not rsTreat.EOF
            If rsDet!Pest Like "*" & rsTreat!TreatmentName & "*" Then
                matchID = rsTreat!TreatmentID
                Exit Do
            End If
            rsTreat.MoveNext
        Loop

        If matchID > 0 Then
            rsDet.Edit
            rsDet!TreatmentID = matchID
            rsDet.Update
        End If

        rsDet.MoveNext
    Loop

    rsDet.Close
    rsTreat.Close

    ' -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    ' PRE-STEP B
    ' Assign Other catch-all to any SPRAY/PPHM rows still unmatched after A
    ' -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    db.Execute _
        "UPDATE [ORDER DETAIL] " & _
        "SET [ORDER DETAIL].TreatmentID = " & otherID & " " & _
        "WHERE [ORDER DETAIL].[Prod Type] IN ('SPRAY','PPHM') " & _
        "AND [ORDER DETAIL].TreatmentID IS NULL;", _
        dbFailOnError

    ' -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    ' STEP 0
    ' Default ScheduleReady = No for ALL accepted records
    ' ML: drop WHERE ScheduleReady IS NULL — reset unconditionally every run
    ' -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    db.Execute _
        "UPDATE [ORDER DETAIL] " & _
        "SET ScheduleReady = No " & _
        "WHERE Accept = Yes;", _
        dbFailOnError

    ' -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    ' STEP 1
    ' Set ScheduleReady = Yes where start date reached and not yet done
    ' ML: use Complete_Date IS NULL as standard "not done" check
    ' -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    db.Execute _
        "UPDATE [ORDER DETAIL] INNER JOIN EVENT " & _
        "ON [ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID " & _
        "AND [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No] " & _
        "SET [ORDER DETAIL].ScheduleReady = Yes " & _
        "WHERE [ORDER DETAIL].Accept = Yes " & _
        "AND [ORDER DETAIL].Start <= Date() " & _
        "AND EVENT.Complete_Date IS NULL;", _
        dbFailOnError

    ' -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    ' STEP 2
    ' Priority = Low for feed/fert records (not complete)
    ' ML: Complete_Date IS NULL as standard check
    ' -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    db.Execute _
        "UPDATE [ORDER DETAIL] INNER JOIN EVENT " & _
        "ON [ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID " & _
        "AND [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No] " & _
        "SET [ORDER DETAIL].Priority = 'Low' " & _
        "WHERE [ORDER DETAIL].Accept = Yes " & _
        "AND ([ORDER DETAIL].Pest LIKE '*feed*' OR [ORDER DETAIL].Pest LIKE '*fert*') " & _
        "AND EVENT.Complete_Date IS NULL;", _
        dbFailOnError

    ' -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    ' STEP 3
    ' Priority = Medium — reset ALL ScheduleReady, not complete, not Low records
    ' ML: overwrite existing priority values, not just null ones
    ' -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    db.Execute _
        "UPDATE [ORDER DETAIL] INNER JOIN EVENT " & _
        "ON [ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID " & _
        "AND [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No] " & _
        "SET [ORDER DETAIL].Priority = 'Medium' " & _
        "WHERE [ORDER DETAIL].Accept = Yes " & _
        "AND [ORDER DETAIL].ScheduleReady = Yes " & _
        "AND [ORDER DETAIL].Priority <> 'Low' " & _
        "AND EVENT.Complete_Date IS NULL;", _
        dbFailOnError

    ' -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    ' STEP 4
    ' Priority = High — escalate via HighPriorityInterval per treatment
    ' Falls back to 10 days for non-SPRAY/PPHM (no TreatmentID match)
    ' ML: Complete_Date IS NULL as standard check
    ' -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    db.Execute _
        "UPDATE [ORDER DETAIL] INNER JOIN EVENT " & _
        "ON [ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID " & _
        "AND [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No] " & _
        "LEFT JOIN tblTreatmentIntervals " & _
        "ON [ORDER DETAIL].TreatmentID = tblTreatmentIntervals.TreatmentID " & _
        "SET [ORDER DETAIL].Priority = 'High' " & _
        "WHERE [ORDER DETAIL].Accept = Yes " & _
        "AND Date() - [ORDER DETAIL].Start > " & _
        "  IIf(tblTreatmentIntervals.HighPriorityInterval IS NULL, 10, tblTreatmentIntervals.HighPriorityInterval) " & _
        "AND [ORDER DETAIL].Priority <> 'Low' " & _
        "AND EVENT.Complete_Date IS NULL;", _
        dbFailOnError

    ' -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    ' STEP 5
    ' Priority = Urgent — escalate via UrgentPriorityInterval per treatment
    ' Falls back to 20 days for non-SPRAY/PPHM (no TreatmentID match)
    ' ML: Complete_Date IS NULL as standard check
    ' -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    db.Execute _
        "UPDATE [ORDER DETAIL] INNER JOIN EVENT " & _
        "ON [ORDER DETAIL].OID = EVENT.OID " & _
        "AND [ORDER DETAIL].[Line No] = EVENT.[Line No] " & _
        "LEFT JOIN tblTreatmentIntervals " & _
        "ON [ORDER DETAIL].TreatmentID = tblTreatmentIntervals.TreatmentID " & _
        "SET [ORDER DETAIL].Priority = 'Urgent' " & _
        "WHERE [ORDER DETAIL].Accept = Yes " & _
        "AND Date() - [ORDER DETAIL].Start > " & _
        "  IIf(tblTreatmentIntervals.UrgentPriorityInterval IS NULL, 20, tblTreatmentIntervals.UrgentPriorityInterval) " & _
        "AND [ORDER DETAIL].Priority <> 'Low' " & _
        "AND EVENT.Complete_Date IS NULL;", _
        dbFailOnError

    MsgBox "Scheduling updated successfully.", vbInformation

CleanUp:
    Set db = Nothing
    Exit Sub

ErrHandler:
    MsgBox "Error " & Err.Number & ": " & Err.Description, vbCritical
    Resume CleanUp

End Sub
